requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (NA/IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（NA/IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（NA/IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological (blue light) safety in Angola is addressed through the IEC 62471 method, which IANORQ adopts as the Angolan NA standard NA/IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems). It classifies LED lamps and luminaires into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance. Unlike the EU, Angola does not have an Ecodesign-style regulation that makes photobiological classification a free-standing legal obligation tied to energy rules; instead, where photobiological safety is required it is handled as part of the IANORQ conformity assessment and supported by an IEC 62471-based test report. Products in higher risk groups (RG2/RG3) generally need a declared risk group and any associated usage warnings in the technical documentation and on labelling, in Portuguese. For most general-lighting LED products the assessed risk group is RG0 or RG1.
summary.zh: 安哥拉的光生物（蓝光）安全通过 IEC 62471 方法处理——IANORQ 将其采用为安哥拉 NA 标准 NA/IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）。该方法依据蓝光加权辐亮度与辐照度，将 LED 灯及灯具分为从 RG0（豁免——无危害）到 RG3（高危险）的危险组别。与欧盟不同，安哥拉没有将光生物分类作为与能效规则挂钩的独立法律义务的生态设计式法规；在要求光生物安全之处，作为 IANORQ 合格评定的一部分处理，并以基于 IEC 62471 的检测报告支撑。较高危险组别（RG2/RG3）的产品一般须在技术文件及标签上以葡萄牙语声明危险组别及任何相关使用警示。对于大多数通用照明 LED 产品，评估的危险组别为 RG0 或 RG1。
summary.zht: 安哥拉的光生物（藍光）安全通過 IEC 62471 方法處理——IANORQ 將其採用為安哥拉 NA 標準 NA/IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）。該方法依據藍光加權輻亮度與輻照度，將 LED 燈及燈具分為從 RG0（豁免——無危害）到 RG3（高危險）的危險組別。與歐盟不同，安哥拉沒有將光生物分類作為與能效規則掛鈎的獨立法律義務的生態設計式法規；在要求光生物安全之處，作為 IANORQ 合格評定的一部分處理，並以基於 IEC 62471 的檢測報告支撐。較高危險組別（RG2/RG3）的產品一般須在技術文件及標籤上以葡萄牙語聲明危險組別及任何相關使用警示。對於大多數通用照明 LED 產品，評估的危險組別為 RG0 或 RG1。

standards_or_laws: NA/IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (IEC standard adopted as an Angolan NA standard by IANORQ; risk group classification RG0-RG3)
IANORQ conformity assessment for regulated lighting products

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically based on IEC/CIE S 009/IEC 62471, providing the same RG0-RG3 risk-group classification method. China has additionally been tightening blue-light requirements for LED products used by children/students through related standards, but the core photobiological safety method shares the IEC 62471 base with the Angolan NA reference. The classification method is broadly comparable; the conformity route and accepting authority differ.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全性），技术上以 IEC/CIE S 009/IEC 62471 为基础，提供相同的 RG0-RG3 危险组别分类方法。中国还通过相关标准持续收紧儿童/学生使用 LED 产品的蓝光要求，但核心光生物安全方法与安哥拉 NA 参考共享 IEC 62471 基础。分类方法大致相当；合格评定路径与受理机关不同。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全性），技術上以 IEC/CIE S 009/IEC 62471 為基礎，提供相同的 RG0-RG3 危險組別分類方法。中國還通過相關標準持續收緊兒童/學生使用 LED 產品的藍光要求，但核心光生物安全方法與安哥拉 NA 參考共享 IEC 62471 基礎。分類方法大致相當；合格評定路徑與受理機關不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR; IEC 62471-based)

gap.en: Because GB/T 20145 and the Angolan NA/IEC 62471 reference share the IEC 62471 method, a luminaire already assessed for risk group in China uses the same underlying classification. The differences are procedural and contextual: (1) in Angola, photobiological evidence (where required) supports IANORQ conformity assessment rather than being tied to an EU-style Ecodesign regulation; (2) any declared risk group and warnings must appear in Portuguese on documentation/labelling; (3) the in-country importer presents the evidence. A practical point: an IEC 62471 test report prepared for the Chinese or international market can usually serve as the underlying evidence for Angola, but confirm with IANORQ / the importer whether a risk-group declaration is required for the specific product and whether higher-risk groups trigger additional conditions.
gap.zh: 由于 GB/T 20145 与安哥拉 NA/IEC 62471 参考共享 IEC 62471 方法，已在中国完成危险组别评估的灯具使用相同的底层分类。差异在程序与情境：（1）在安哥拉，光生物证据（在要求时）支撑 IANORQ 合格评定，而非与欧盟式生态设计法规挂钩；（2）任何声明的危险组别及警示须以葡萄牙语出现在文件/标签上；（3）由在地进口商提交证据。一个务实要点：为中国或国际市场准备的 IEC 62471 检测报告通常可作为安哥拉的底层证据，但请与 IANORQ/进口商确认特定产品是否须作危险组别声明，以及较高危险组别是否触发额外条件。
gap.zht: 由於 GB/T 20145 與安哥拉 NA/IEC 62471 參考共享 IEC 62471 方法，已在中國完成危險組別評估的燈具使用相同的底層分類。差異在程序與情境：（1）在安哥拉，光生物證據（在要求時）支撐 IANORQ 合格評定，而非與歐盟式生態設計法規掛鈎；（2）任何聲明的危險組別及警示須以葡萄牙語出現在文件/標籤上；（3）由在地進口商提交證據。一個務實要點：為中國或國際市場準備的 IEC 62471 檢測報告通常可作為安哥拉的底層證據，但請與 IANORQ/進口商確認特定產品是否須作危險組別聲明，以及較高危險組別是否觸發額外條件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / expected within conformity assessment — photobiological safety to NA/IEC 62471 supports IANORQ conformity assessment where required; not tied to an EU-style Ecodesign regulation. Confirm risk-group declaration requirements with IANORQ / the importer
mandatory_status.cn: Applicable method — GB/T 20145-2006 (IEC 62471-based) provides risk-group classification; additional blue-light requirements apply to certain product categories

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola assesses photobiological (blue light) safety using the IEC 62471 method adopted as NA/IEC 62471, classifying products RG0-RG3. Unlike the EU, this is not tied to an Ecodesign-style regulation; where required it supports IANORQ conformity assessment. A Chinese or international IEC 62471 test report can usually serve as the underlying evidence, but any declared risk group and warnings must be in Portuguese and presented by the in-country importer. Confirm with IANORQ whether a risk-group declaration is required for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉使用采用为 NA/IEC 62471 的 IEC 62471 方法评估光生物（蓝光）安全，将产品分为 RG0-RG3。与欧盟不同，这不与生态设计式法规挂钩；在要求时支撑 IANORQ 合格评定。中国或国际 IEC 62471 检测报告通常可作为底层证据，但任何声明的危险组别及警示须以葡萄牙语提供，并由在地进口商提交。请与 IANORQ 确认特定产品是否须作危险组别声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉使用採用為 NA/IEC 62471 的 IEC 62471 方法評估光生物（藍光）安全，將產品分為 RG0-RG3。與歐盟不同，這不與生態設計式法規掛鈎；在要求時支撐 IANORQ 合格評定。中國或國際 IEC 62471 檢測報告通常可作為底層證據，但任何聲明的危險組別及警示須以葡萄牙語提供，並由在地進口商提交。請與 IANORQ 確認特定產品是否須作危險組別聲明。

requirement_topic.en: Product Marking, Portuguese Labelling and Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标志、葡萄牙语标签及文件
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標誌、葡萄牙語標籤及文件

summary.en: For the Angolan market, product marking, the rating plate, safety warnings, user instructions, and packaging information are generally expected to be in Portuguese, the official language of Angola. There is no EU-style CE mark; instead, products carry the manufacturer/importer identification and ratings consistent with the adopted NA/IEC standards, plus any mark or documentation required by IANORQ conformity assessment. Required content typically includes rated voltage/frequency (220 V / 50 Hz suitability), wattage and luminous output, the responsible importer's details (a local in-country importer/representative is required), and safety/usage warnings — including any photobiological risk-group warning for higher-risk products. Energy-labelled products must additionally carry the national energy label (see ledao-ecodesign). The importer of record is responsible for ensuring labels and documentation meet Angolan requirements at the point of import and sale.
summary.zh: 对于安哥拉市场，产品标志、铭牌、安全警示、用户说明书及包装信息一般预期须以安哥拉官方语言葡萄牙语提供。不存在欧盟式 CE 标志；产品须带有与采用的 NA/IEC 标准一致的制造商/进口商标识及额定值，以及 IANORQ 合格评定所要求的任何标志或文件。所需内容通常包括额定电压/频率（适用 220 V / 50 Hz）、功率与光输出、负责进口商的信息（须有在地进口商/代表），以及安全/使用警示——包括较高危险产品的任何光生物危险组别警示。能效标识产品还须带有国家能效标签（见 ledao-ecodesign）。记录进口商负责确保在进口及销售环节标签与文件满足安哥拉要求。
summary.zht: 對於安哥拉市場，產品標誌、銘牌、安全警示、用戶說明書及包裝信息一般預期須以安哥拉官方語言葡萄牙語提供。不存在歐盟式 CE 標誌；產品須帶有與採用的 NA/IEC 標準一致的製造商/進口商標識及額定值，以及 IANORQ 合格評定所要求的任何標誌或文件。所需內容通常包括額定電壓/頻率（適用 220 V / 50 Hz）、功率與光輸出、負責進口商的信息（須有在地進口商/代表），以及安全/使用警示——包括較高危險產品的任何光生物危險組別警示。能效標識產品還須帶有國家能效標籤（見 ledao-ecodesign）。記錄進口商負責確保在進口及銷售環節標籤與文件滿足安哥拉要求。

standards_or_laws: Angolan official-language (Portuguese) labelling and documentation expectation for imported products
IANORQ conformity assessment marking/documentation requirements; in-country importer/representative requirement

summary.en: For the Chinese market, product marking, the rating plate, and instructions are in Chinese, and CCC-certified luminaires carry the CCC mark. The China RoHS hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green per SJ/T 11364) and the China Energy Label (CEL) are affixed where applicable. The marking language, the certification mark (CCC), and the labelling schemes are China-specific and do not transfer to Angola, which requires Portuguese-language information and IANORQ-route documentation rather than the CCC mark.
summary.zh: 对于中国市场，产品标志、铭牌及说明书为中文，经 CCC 认证的灯具带有 CCC 标志。在适用情况下贴附中国 RoHS 有害物质披露标识（依 SJ/T 11364 的橙/绿色）及中国能效标识（CEL）。标志语言、认证标志（CCC）及标识方案为中国特有，不能转用于安哥拉——安哥拉要求葡萄牙语信息及 IANORQ 路径文件，而非 CCC 标志。
summary.zht: 對於中國市場，產品標誌、銘牌及說明書為中文，經 CCC 認證的燈具帶有 CCC 標誌。在適用情況下貼附中國 RoHS 有害物質披露標識（依 SJ/T 11364 的橙/綠色）及中國能效標識（CEL）。標誌語言、認證標誌（CCC）及標識方案為中國特有，不能轉用於安哥拉——安哥拉要求葡萄牙語信息及 IANORQ 路徑文件，而非 CCC 標誌。

standards_or_laws: CCC mark — affixed to CCC-certified luminaires for the Chinese market
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label; China Energy Label (CEL) where applicable

gap.en: The labelling/documentation gap is mostly about language and scheme rather than technical content: (1) Angola requires Portuguese-language marking, instructions, warnings, and packaging information, whereas CN material is in Chinese — translation and re-labelling are needed; (2) there is no CE mark and no transfer of the CCC mark; Angolan products carry NA/IEC-consistent markings plus any IANORQ-required mark/documentation; (3) the responsible-party identity must be the local in-country importer/representative (not just the Chinese manufacturer); (4) energy-labelled products must carry the Angolan national energy label, and higher-risk photobiological products must declare the risk group. Practically, manufacturers should plan a Portuguese label/manual set and coordinate with the importer on which marks and documents IANORQ requires for the specific product category.
gap.zh: 标签/文件差距主要在语言与方案而非技术内容：（1）安哥拉要求葡萄牙语标志、说明书、警示及包装信息，而中国材料为中文——须翻译并重新贴标；（2）不存在 CE 标志，CCC 标志亦不能转用；安哥拉产品须带有与 NA/IEC 一致的标志及 IANORQ 要求的任何标志/文件；（3）责任方身份须为在地进口商/代表（而非仅中国制造商）；（4）能效标识产品须带有安哥拉国家能效标签，较高危险光生物产品须声明危险组别。务实上，制造商应规划一套葡萄牙语标签/手册，并与进口商协调 IANORQ 对特定产品类别要求哪些标志与文件。
gap.zht: 標籤/文件差距主要在語言與方案而非技術內容：（1）安哥拉要求葡萄牙語標誌、說明書、警示及包裝信息，而中國材料為中文——須翻譯並重新貼標；（2）不存在 CE 標誌，CCC 標誌亦不能轉用；安哥拉產品須帶有與 NA/IEC 一致的標誌及 IANORQ 要求的任何標誌/文件；（3）責任方身份須為在地進口商/代表（而非僅中國製造商）；（4）能效標識產品須帶有安哥拉國家能效標籤，較高危險光生物產品須聲明危險組別。務實上，製造商應規劃一套葡萄牙語標籤/手冊，並與進口商協調 IANORQ 對特定產品類別要求哪些標誌與文件。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory — Portuguese-language marking, instructions and warnings, NA/IEC-consistent product marking, and an in-country importer/representative as the responsible party; specific IANORQ marks/documents to be confirmed by product category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese-language marking and instructions; CCC mark for certified luminaires; China RoHS disclosure label and CEL where applicable

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola requires Portuguese-language marking, instructions, warnings, and packaging information, with NA/IEC-consistent product marking and a local in-country importer/representative as the responsible party — there is no CE mark, and the Chinese CCC mark does not transfer. Energy-labelled products carry the national energy label, and higher-risk photobiological products declare their risk group. Plan a Portuguese label/manual set and confirm the specific IANORQ marks and documents with the importer for the product category before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉要求葡萄牙语标志、说明书、警示及包装信息，须带有与 NA/IEC 一致的产品标志，并以在地进口商/代表为责任方——不存在 CE 标志，中国 CCC 标志不能转用。能效标识产品须带有国家能效标签，较高危险光生物产品须声明危险组别。出货前请规划一套葡萄牙语标签/手册，并与进口商确认该产品类别所需的具体 IANORQ 标志与文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉要求葡萄牙語標誌、說明書、警示及包裝信息，須帶有與 NA/IEC 一致的產品標誌，並以在地進口商/代表為責任方——不存在 CE 標誌，中國 CCC 標誌不能轉用。能效標識產品須帶有國家能效標籤，較高危險光生物產品須聲明危險組別。出貨前請規劃一套葡萄牙語標籤/手冊，並與進口商確認該產品類別所需的具體 IANORQ 標誌與文件。
